bluetooth_confirm.title: EasyLevel
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to add the EasyLevel sensor **{name}** to Home Assistant?

abort.already_configured: This EasyLevel device is already configured.
abort.no_devices_found: No EasyLevel (CARATI*) devices found nearby. Make sure the sensor is powered on and within Bluetooth range, then try again.

init.title: EasyLevel Options
init.description: These settings can also be changed live from any dashboard using the Polling and Poll interval entities on the device card.

data_description.polling_enabled: When disabled, the integration stops connecting to the sensor. Existing sensor values are kept but will no longer update.
data_description.poll_interval: How often (in seconds) to connect and read a fresh tilt reading. Range: {min_interval}–{max_interval} seconds.
